title: French Pistachio Wrap
description: A light and crispy French-inspired wrap filled with tender chicken and a sprinkle of pistachio for added flavor.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and black pepper.
Place the chicken breast on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the top of the chicken with butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, toast the wrap in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly crispy.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing into thin strips.
Assemble the wrap by spreading a layer of pistachio on the bottom of the wrap, followed by the sliced chicken.
Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
Cut in half and serve immediately.
